description: Creates a morning briefing with priorities, calendar, and key updates

procedure.description:
[overview] # Daily Briefing

You create a concise morning briefing so the user starts their day knowing exactly what matters.

[When Triggered] User says: "Brief me", "Morning briefing", "What's on today?", "Start my day"
Or: run automatically via heartbeat/cron if configured.

[Briefing Template] ```
вҳҖпёҸ DAILY BRIEFING вҖ” [Day, Month Date, Year]
в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

рҹ“… TODAY'S SCHEDULE
вҖў [Time] вҖ” [Event] ([Location/Link])
вҖў [Time] вҖ” [Event] ([Location/Link])
вҖў [No meetings today вҖ” deep work day!]

рҹҺҜ TOP 3 PRIORITIES
1. [Most important thing]
2. [Second priority]
3. [Third priority]

рҹ“§ INBOX HIGHLIGHTS
вҖў [Urgent/important emails worth noting]
вҖў [X unread emails, Y flagged]

рҹ“° RELEVANT NEWS
вҖў [Industry news or updates that matter]

вҡЎ FOLLOW-UPS DUE
вҖў [Person] вҖ” [Action] (was due [date])
вҖў [Person] вҖ” [Action] (due today)

рҹ’Ў HEADS UP
вҖў [Upcoming deadlines this week]
вҖў [Meetings to prep for tomorrow]
вҖў [Anything else worth knowing]
```

[Priority Framework] Rank tasks using this matrix:

| | Urgent | Not Urgent |
|---|--------|------------|
| **Important** | DO FIRST вҖ” Calendar conflicts, client emergencies, deadlines today | SCHEDULE вҖ” Strategic work, planning, relationship building |
| **Not Important** | DELEGATE/QUICK вҖ” Admin tasks, routine replies | SKIP вҖ” Time-wasters, low-value meetings |

[Data Sources] Pull from whatever's available:
- **Calendar** вҖ” Today's events and tomorrow's early events
- **Email** вҖ” Unread count, flagged/urgent messages, key senders
- **CRM** вҖ” Follow-ups due (if crm-manager skill is active)
- **Tasks/Notes** вҖ” Any tracked to-dos or project notes
- **News** вҖ” Industry-relevant headlines via web search
- **Weather** вҖ” Quick forecast if relevant

[Rules] - Keep it scannable. The whole briefing should take 60 seconds to read.
- Prioritize ruthlessly. Don't list everything вҖ” list what matters.
- If calendar is empty, say so (that's useful info вҖ” it's a deep work day).
- If no email access, skip that section. Don't fake it.
- End with something useful вҖ” a heads-up about tomorrow or this week.
- Adjust tone to time of day. Morning = energetic. Evening recap = reflective.
- Include time zones if the user works across zones.

[Evening Recap (Optional)] If asked at end of day: "How'd today go?" or "End of day recap"

```
рҹҢҷ END OF DAY вҖ” [Date]
в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

вң… COMPLETED
вҖў [What got done]

рҹ”„ CARRIED OVER
вҖў [What didn't get done вҖ” moves to tomorrow]

рҹ“қ NOTES
вҖў [Key decisions, insights, things to remember]

рҹ“… TOMORROW PREVIEW
вҖў [First meeting/deadline]
```
